texts.Invalid session file format: 'pairs' mus: Invalid session file format: 'pairs' must be a list.
HP or LP root not found.
texts.No finalized meshes found. Run 'Combine: No final meshes. Run Combine Fin first.
texts.Export combined LP meshes for ALL chapte: Export combined LP meshes for all chapters?
texts.Base names differ.\nChoose name for pair:
Base names differ.
Choose name for pair:
texts.Choose cluster to REPLACE with current v: Replace cluster with current viewport selection:

tooltips.Lock subgroup: Lock this subgroup so Analyze HP and Assign LP Meshes do not rebuild it.
tooltips.Unlock subgroup: Unlock this subgroup and allow automatic tools to modify it again.
tooltips.Pick HP: Store the selected HP root group for a new chapter.
tooltips.Pick LP: Store the selected LP root group for a new chapter.
tooltips.Create Pair from Picked: Create a chapter from the selected HP and LP roots and add it to the Table of Contents.
The selected HP root will appear here.
The selected LP root will appear here.
tooltips.Auto-Isolate: Automatically isolate the active chapter in the viewport when you select it.
tooltips.Keep HP: Keep the existing HP hierarchy instead of flattening and rebuilding it during analysis.
tooltips.Combine: Combine the selected meshes into one object. This is a manual modeling tool, not the final bake combine.
tooltips.Separate: Split the selected mesh into separate parts. Recommended before Analyze HP for multi-shell meshes.
tooltips.Find ZBrush: Find HP meshes with a high percentage of triangular faces. Right-click to adjust the threshold.
tooltips.Analyze HP: Automatically split HP meshes in the active chapter into bake subgroups.
tooltips.Assign LP Meshes: Assign LP meshes to LP subgroups using the current HP subgroup structure.
tooltips.HP Visible: Show or hide the active chapter HP root.
tooltips.HP Hidden: Show or hide the active chapter HP root.
tooltips.LP Visible: Show or hide the LP root. In Final Group mode this controls final combined low meshes.
tooltips.LP Hidden: Show or hide the LP root. In Final Group mode this controls final combined low meshes.
tooltips.Low Visible: Show the final combined low meshes for the active chapter.
tooltips.Low Hidden: Hide the final combined low meshes for the active chapter.
tooltips.Groups Vis: Show or hide all subgroups in the active chapter.
tooltips.Groups Hidden: Show or hide all subgroups in the active chapter.
tooltips.Find Sim: Find similar meshes inside the active HP or LP root. Right-click to switch to Find All.
tooltips.Find All: Broader similar-mesh search that ignores strict layout matching. Right-click to return to Find Sim.
tooltips.Add to Act: Move the current selection into the active subgroup.
tooltips.Combine Fin: Build final triangulated low meshes from LP subgroups and rename HP meshes for export.
tooltips.Smooth View: Preview HP smoothing in the viewport. ZBrush geometry is skipped.
tooltips.Smooth ON: Turn off smoothing preview and restore normal viewport display.
tooltips.Final Group: Enter the final check mode for smooth levels and export.
tooltips.Back: Return from Final Group mode to the normal subgroup list.
tooltips.Export: Export the active chapter. Right-click for export options.
tooltips.Save Session: Save the current Bake Groups session.
tooltips.Load Session: Load a Bake Groups session JSON. Supports both project auto-save lists and files with a pairs key.
tooltips.placeholder:Group name: Name for a new paired subgroup. Leave empty to create Group_XX.
tooltips.Create Group: Create paired HP/LP subgroups and move the relevant selection into them.
tooltips.HP Clustering Strategy:: Choose the strategy used for automatic HP grouping.
tooltips.combo:Spatial Volume Match: Match by position, bounding box, and volume.
tooltips.combo:PCA Shape Alignment: Use shape alignment for harder matching cases.
tooltips.combo:Topology Fingerprint: Compare topology fingerprints and element counts.
tooltips.Calculate Symmetry Score (.pyd): Use the C++ core to analyze symmetry and shape metrics.
tooltips.HP Collision (%):: Tolerance for HP/LP overlap and matching. Higher is softer; lower is stricter.
tooltips.HP Max Groups:: Maximum number of automatic HP groups. 0 means no practical limit.
tooltips.Ignore Floaters: Skip the floater/decal pass during Analyze HP. Use it when small hole/decal meshes are being pulled into the wrong large group.
tooltips.Wire Elongation (>):: Elongation threshold for wire or pipe-like parts.
tooltips.HP Link Vtx:: Minimum number of nearby vertices required to treat HP meshes as one compound element.
tooltips.HP Link Dist (%):: Maximum vertex distance for compound HP linking, measured as a percentage of the smaller HP bbox diagonal.
tooltips.Vis: Show or hide this subgroup or final row.
tooltips.Hid: Show or hide this subgroup or final row.
tooltips.Add: Move the current selection into this subgroup.
tooltips.X: Delete this subgroup. Child meshes are returned to the root.
tooltips.combo:Smooth 1: Light HP smoothing for preview and export.
tooltips.combo:Smooth 2: Standard HP smoothing for preview and export.
tooltips.combo:Smooth 3: Strong HP smoothing. Use carefully on heavy scenes.
tooltips.TABLE OF CONTENTS: List of chapters and books. Click a chapter to make it active.
tooltips.Export Book: Batch export every chapter in the active book.
tooltips.Separate HP and LP: Export HP and LP as separate FBX files.
tooltips.HP+LP in single file: Export HP and LP for each chapter into one FBX file.
tooltips.Book: Use every chapter in the active book.
tooltips.Optimize subgroups (delete empty): Delete empty subgroups in the active chapter.
tooltips.Group search by mesh (Ctrl+Shift+Z): Find and activate the subgroup that contains the selected mesh or component. (Ctrl+Shift+Z)
tooltips.Select all _low meshes (Active Chapter): Select final _low meshes in the active chapter.
tooltips.Select all _low meshes (Entire Book): Select final _low meshes in every chapter of the active book.
tooltips.Find ZBrush now: Run ZBrush candidate search with the current threshold.
tooltips.Triangular faces: {value}%: Triangle-face percentage threshold for ZBrush candidate detection.
tooltips.Select: Select the found meshes and stop the current operation.
tooltips.Skip: Continue without fixing the detected candidates.
tooltips.Batch HP->LP Matcher (Active Pair): Manual and semi-automatic HP-to-LP linking for the active chapter.
tooltips.Tolerance (%):: Allowed bbox/size deviation when searching for LP groups.
tooltips.Min HP/LP:: Minimum number of HP elements inside LP bounds required for a proposal.
tooltips.Strict Geo Check (Resolve Overlaps): Use stricter geometry and overlap checks when finding LP groups.
tooltips.Find LP Groups: Find LP groups and propose matching HP clusters.
tooltips.Relocate HP: Create real HP groups from saved manual links and move linked meshes into them.
tooltips.Link: Save the selected proposal or current HP selection as a manual link.
tooltips.New: Create a new manual cluster. Selected HP meshes are added immediately.
tooltips.Select Meshes: Select the contents of the chosen chapters.
tooltips.Group into Book (Ctrl+G): Put the selected chapters into a new book.
tooltips.Add to: Add the selected chapters to an existing book.
tooltips.Extract from the book: Remove the selected chapters from their book.
tooltips.Delete Selection: Remove entries from the Bake Groups manager. Maya nodes are not deleted.
